title: lepechinia alpina
intro: Lepechinia alpina, also known as Mountain Hyssop or Alpina Hyssop, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Native to the Andes mountain range in South America, this plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepechinia alpina include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce stress levels. Lepechinia alpina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
